subcodes.first_line: O thou who art attracted by the fragrances of God! The trumpet hath been sounded, and the bugle hath been blown, and the earth hath quaked [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها المنجذب بنفحات الله قد نفح فی الصور و نقر فی الناقور و الارض زلزلت و
subcodes.subjects: @heaven and paradise; heaven and hell, @apocalyptic imagery, @praise and encouragement, @chastisement and requital
